text:
Message Editing: improved experience, making it easier to type & edit long messages.
Bug Fixes & Minor Improvements.

Calls: Improved overall call stability.
Video: Added the option to hide your self-view during video calls.
Reactions: Added more emojis.
Bug Fixes & Minor Improvements.

Replies (Major Feature): Now available across Mobile, Web and Desktop apps.
Editor+: New option for the Editor role to allow or restrict item downloads.
Connection Management: Remove a Contact & Reconnect anytime.
Bug Fixes & Minor Improvements.

Better user connection experience.
More reliable file uploads on unstable networks.
Bug Fixes & Minor Improvements.

Enhanced Chat experience: message rendering, drafts, reactions & media opening.
Enhanced Drive experience in unstable networks: file uploads, folder actions & navigation.
Polished core UI elements across menus: pop-ups, modals, avatars, inputs, action bars, emoji picker & co-editing screens.
Vulnerability scanning with AI tools: comprehensive security audit successfully completed. Report available on demand.

Enhanced Chat experience: message rendering, drafts, reactions & media viewing.
Improved App responsiveness after calls: smoother transitions back into the app.
Enhanced Call experience: across active, background & locked-device states.
Enhanced Drive experience in unstable networks: file uploads & navigation.
Polished core UI elements across menus: pop-ups, modals, avatars, inputs, action bars, emoji picker. 
AI-powered vulnerability code scanning successfully completed.
